description: The DistanceMeter component is used by the Meter Tool to display the distance between slots placed by it.

fields.Anchors: List of points being used to measure right now.
fields._legacyAnchor0: Legacy, unused. For when the tool only measured two points.
fields._legacyAnchor1: Legacy, unused. For when the tool only measured two points.
fields.FormatUnit: The formatting string to use when formatting the distance number
fields.FormatNumber: How to format the distance number
fields.CompoundFormatUnits: The format string to format compound measurement units with.
fields.CompoundUseLongNames: Whether to use long name of distance (Ex: cm vs Centimeter)
fields.CompoundOverrideNames: Whether to use compound measurements or not.
fields.CompoundDiscardLastFraction: Whether to discard small distances like Millimeters.
fields.CompoundSeparator: What to separate compound measurements with (like spaces or commas)
fields.CompoundZeroHandling: How to handle compound measurements (1 meter 1cm 10mm)
fields.MeasurementSpace: The transform space to measure in.
fields.DistanceText: The field to drive when displaying the total amount of distance.
